job_description:
# Lead Healthcare Analyst
Company: Marathon Health
Source: Indeed
Employment type: Full-time
Checked: April 30, 2026
URL: https://www.indeed.com/viewjob?jk=f98d9989e3830d79

## Highlights
- Remote healthcare analyst role with salary range shown as $95,000-$120,000.
- Focuses on volume, utilization, cost, clinical quality, outcomes, patient satisfaction, health center performance, standard/custom Tableau reporting, claims data, demographics, biometrics, ROI, and stakeholder presentations.
- Requires SQL, Tableau, Excel, PowerPoint, healthcare analytics experience, and communication with clinical/non-technical stakeholders.
- Indeed notes applications are accepted until a candidate is selected.
strengths: Strong healthcare analytics, claims, SQL, Tableau/Power BI, reporting, and stakeholder communication alignment.
Good fit for payer/claims data and data storytelling from validated healthcare data.
gaps: Lead/client presentation emphasis is stronger than the base resume; tailor to stakeholder partnership without overstating formal leadership.
Direct advanced primary care/population health model experience is not explicit.
notes: Apply first/if time. Tailor toward healthcare claims analysis, SQL, Tableau/Power BI reporting, stakeholder-ready insights, and data quality supporting clinical and operational decisions.

replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst
replacements.replace: Healthcare Data Analyst | SQL Reporting | Data Quality

replacements.find: Power BI, Tableau, Excel (advanced – pivots, lookups, Power Query)
replacements.replace: Power BI, Tableau, Excel (advanced pivots, lookups, Power Query), healthcare reporting
